examples: The floodwater hit the village with particular ferocity, demolishing around 200 houses.
Numerous tribes have legends of massive, hairy creatures that would kidnap and eat humans, overpowering them with their ferocity and strength.
The police were shocked by the ferocity of the attack.
It was a small victory over the ferocity of an attack on entirely innocent people.
We surfed again during the late afternoon, when the swell had lost some ferocity.
